---
title: "Source notes"
---

Source notes are short notes attached to a whole source rather than to a specific coded passage.

Use source notes for:

- context about a transcript or document
- data quality issues
- uncertainty to revisit later
- follow-up questions

Use codes when the observation belongs to a specific passage.

## Open and edit notes

Steps:

1. Open a source.
2. Open the note drawer.
3. Write the note.
4. Return to coding.

Notes save into the `.ace` project file.

Empty notes are removed, so ACE only keeps notes with content.

## Export notes

Export notes when you want to review source-level observations outside ACE or include them in an audit trail.
